name: GOLFTEC Lynnwood
address: 3225 Alderwood Mall Blvd Suite G, Lynnwood, WA 98036
about: GOLFTEC Lynnwood is a technology-driven golf training studio specializing in personalized instruction and club fitting. The facility utilizes advanced systems like OPTIMOTION motion tracking, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-driven feedback on swings. Lessons are structured around personalized game plans designed for both beginners and experienced golfers, with a focus on long-term improvement and on-course application. The environment is centered around professional coaching with an integrated pro shop offering equipment and a 10% discount for students.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven instruction using launch monitors and OPTIMOTION technology for precise swing analysis
Personalized game plans with professional coaching tailored to individual goals and skill levels
Integrated club fitting services that promise an average of 21 more yards off the tee

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned. BYOB policy not specified.
No on-site bar service mentioned. BYOB policy not specified.

simulator_hardware.notes: Used in club fitting and practice sessions to measure club and ball data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available through the pro shop, but bringing your own clubs is recommended for personalized fitting sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided on bringing outside food or drinks; the facility does not appear to have an on-site bar or kitchen.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator time is not specified as an hourly rate for full rounds; sessions are booked for lessons or practice based on personalized plans.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is suitable for youth golfers, with technology designed to help juniors see and understand their progress.
